intentSynonyms: copy a google doc in gdocs
description: Create a copy of an existing Google Doc. You can optionally rename the new copy, move it into a folder, and set a Drive description.

document_id.description: Google Docs document ID to copy

name.description: Optional title for the copied document

folder_id.description: Optional Drive folder ID where the copy should be created

description.description: Optional Drive file description for the new copy
